PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select it to open emulation options

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Speed hacks
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable it to get better performance in games like K.Instinct, M.Kombat or CPS3. You should only enable it to play those games because other games may work poorly or not work.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Show FPS
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable it to turn FPS display on

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Auto frameskip
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable it to turn auto frameskip on
Enables the reading of the cheat database
Enable it to activate hiscore MAME plugin to save and restores high scores for games that did not originally save high scores in non-volatile memory

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Input macro
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable it to allows you to trigger a sequence of emulated input actions with a key or button combination. Note: The plugin is available from MAME UI plugin options
Enable it to allows you to simulate repeatedly pressing an emulated button by holding down a key or button combination. Note: The plugin is available from MAME UI plugin options

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Skip game info
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Forces to skip displaying the system info screen

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Zoom to window
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Automatically zooms the emulated display so that portrait and landscape games use the entire device window. Disable if you use artwork to zoom into the screen area in MAME video options using fixed orientation and wide resolutions

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Disable DRC
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Disable DRC (dynamic recompiler) CPU core. Enable it to test compatibility in some games that freezes or not launch at the expense of performance

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: DRC use C
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Force DRC to use the C backend (compatibility but much less performance)

PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select it to open vector games options

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Beam 2x
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Sets the width of the vectors to 2x
Simulates a vector flicker effect

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Default MAME data
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Restore MAME data to default values (mame.ini, mame_avail.ini, cfg and nvram files)
Select it to open input options

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Touch controller
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select it to open touch controller options

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Customize layout
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select to customize fullscreen touch control layout

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Default layout
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Restore fullscreen touch control layout to default values

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Hide stick
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable to hide stick or dpad when fullscreen

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Always show G,H buttons
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable it to always show G,H buttons when full screen so you can bind them MAME actions
Animated touch control. Disable for performance boost
Enable to vibrate when touch

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Digital dead zone
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable Touch Dead Zone

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Game controller
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select it to open external controller options

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Autodetect controllers
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Automatically detect and map known gamepads (e.g., Xbox or PlayStation).

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Map Buttons
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Assign your physical controller or keyboard to the arcade D-pad and buttons.

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Restore Defaults
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Reset all button configurations to their original default values.

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Share mapping profile
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Forces all controllers to share the exact same mapping profile. Map the first one controller profile, and the rest will use the same layout (Multiplayer is still supported). Ideal for identical clone gamepads or hardware with detection issues.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Hide touch controls in MAME UI
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Hide the on-screen buttons in the main interface when a controller is connected (fullscreen only).

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Hide touch controls in-game
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Hide the on-screen buttons during gameplay when a controller is connected (fullscreen only).

PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select it to open mouse options.\n(On touch mouse, second finger will be main fire. Third finger when second finger is pressed will be alternate fire)

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Physical Mouse
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable physical (hardware) mouse support

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Touch mouse
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable touch mouse support

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Gaming touch mouse
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable to use touch mouse for games (autodetected).

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Always gaming touch mouse
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Forces the use of the touch mouse in all games (useful when fails autodetect).

PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select it to open keyboard options

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Physical keyboard
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable physical (hardware) keyboard support

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Hide touch controller
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable to auto hide touch controller when physical keyboard is detected

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Virtual keyboard
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable virtual keyboard support

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Touch lightgun
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select it to open touch lightgun options.\n(First finger will be main fire. Second finger when first finger is pressed will be alternate fire)

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Touch lightgun
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable to use touch lightgun for games (autodetected).

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Always touch lightgun
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Forces the use of the touch lighgun in all games (useful when fails autodetect).

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Long press as button two
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable to use first finger long press as button two. Useful for t.crisis

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Bottom as reload
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Touch at the bottom of the screen to get off-screen reload

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Tilt controller
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select it to open tilt controller options

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Tilt sensor
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable to use tilt sensor for games.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Tilt as analog
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable to use tilt sensor as analog device, disable to use as digital

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Touch anywhere
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable to tap anywhere on screen to fire. First finger is main fire. Second finger when first finger is pressed is alternate fire

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Invert X axe
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable to invert X axe.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Swap Z,Y axes
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable to swap Z,Y axes. This fixes vertical tilt on some devices

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: MAME touch UI
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable support for navigating MAME menus / arworks using the touch screen

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Override SAT and DZ
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Override MAME deadzone and saturation so touch stick and lightgun are accurate

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: P4,P3,P2 as P1
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Allow a single input device to control multiple players at once. Could cause problems in some ROMs

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enables MAME's native renderer instead of the legacy (well tested) software renderer. Unlocks shaders and improves vector games. Important: Set Emulated Resolution to 'Native' to enjoy high-res artworks without any performance drop.
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Native Renderer (Shaders and HDR)

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Smooth scaling
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Select to turn bitmap filtering on

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: True HDR Display
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Unlocks peak panel brightness and Wide Color Gamut for vector games. Requires an HDR-capable screen.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Vector Advanced Effects
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: TODO . (Only works with Native renderer)

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Vector Calibration (Expert Mode)
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Fine-tune optical bloom, exposure, electron beam physics and yoke voltage.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: FBO Half Resolution
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Renders vector passes at 50% resolution.\n• GAIN: Saves massive GPU fillrate and battery, making the glow smoother.\n• LOSS: Sacrifices vector core crispness, introducing jagged edges (aliasing) on sharp geometry like text and ships.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: CRT Global Drive (Voltage)
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Master brightness knob (Voltage overdrive).

SeekBarPreference.android:title: CRT Base Luminance (Nits)
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: The physical baseline light of a standard vector (Default: 300 nits). Note: Only applies when 'True HDR Display' is enabled.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: CRT Max Luminance (Nits)
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: The absolute physical limit of the emulated arcade monitor (Default: 400 nits). Note: Only applies when 'True HDR Display' is enabled.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable HDR Auto-Exposure
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Camera eye-adaptation. Dims the screen dynamically during bright explosions.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Fixed Manual Exposure
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Used only if Auto-Exposure is OFF. Adjusts the baseline brightness.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Auto-Exposure Multiplier
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Boosts or dims the overall dynamic range of the adaptation.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Auto-Exposure Threshold
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Screen area % that triggers maximum dimming (radar/explosions).

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable Optical Bloom
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Calculate light scattering inside the CRT glass (Halos).

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Line Bloom Spread
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Physical thickness of the glowing halo around lines.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Line Bloom Intensity
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Base opacity of the glowing halo around lines.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Point/Star Bloom Spread
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Physical thickness of the glowing halo around isolated vertices.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Point/Star Bloom Intensity
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Base opacity of the glowing halo around isolated vertices.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable Phosphor Saturation
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Calculates physical expansion when the vector exceeds peak brightness.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Max HDR Saturation
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Absolute limit for extra HDR energy a vector can accumulate.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Line Physical Expansion
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: How much lines widen when saturated with excess energy.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Point Physical Expansion
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: How much points widen when saturated with excess energy.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Color Crosstalk (White Core)
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: How much excess energy bleeds into other channels to create white highlights.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable Beam Dynamics
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Simulates the beam burning harder on short strokes (like text and ships).

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Short Line Energy Boost
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Extra light energy given to tiny strokes.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Short Line Thermal Expansion
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: How much the core physically widens when burning the phosphor harder.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable Corner Burn (Dwell)
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Simulates the beam slowing down at sharp corners, causing bright weld points.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Corner Sharpness Threshold
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: How sharp an angle must be to trigger deceleration and burning.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Corner Intensity Boost
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Extra energy dumped into the corner weld.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Corner Size Confinement
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Restricts the corner burn to keep it sharp and avoid spherical blobs.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Phosphor Color Response
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Simulates how green colors excite the phosphor more efficiently than blue.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Base Phosphor Floor
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Minimum energy retained by inefficient colors like pure blue.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Luminance Multiplier
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: How much the specific color boosts the physical energy output.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable Phosphor Trails
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Simulate temporal ghosting (Ping-Pong FBO).

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Trail Decay Speed
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Lower = Long Radar smear. Higher = Fast Arcade fade.

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Enable Magnetic Noise
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Simulate coil heat, AC hum, and voltage fluctuations.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Jitter Severity
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Maximum physical deviation of the electron beam.

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Voltage Flicker
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Maximum intensity drop caused by random voltage fluctuation.

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Restore CRT Defaults
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Reset all advanced CRT calibration values to factory defaults.
Select it to configure media scraping service

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable it to do media scraping thanks to Arcade Database by motoschifo. This will download icons or snapshots belonging to your own ROMSET so that they will be displayed on the frontend. You must configure the display of images in MAME UI (in the 'show side panels' option) if is necessary. Note: Media scraping will only scrape systems on external storage
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Enable media scraping
Scrape icons
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable it to scrape icons that will be showed on the system list

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Scrape snapshots
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable it to scrape snapshots that will be showed on the images panel

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Scrape additional media
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable to scrape the rest of available media like cabinets images. This will use up a lot of storage space and the download will take longer

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Resize images to save space
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable it to resize images so that less storage space is used

PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select it to open general options

PreferenceScreen.android:title: Change ROMs path
PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Change roms location. You have to move ROMs files manually

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Save States in ROMs path
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Game states will be stored under ROM files folder. This prevents Android 11+ from deleting them when using external storage for ROMs files and uninstalling the app

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Warn on exit
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Enable it to warn when you press the exit button when gaming

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Use Notch
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Expand display area to use notch area on devices supported

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Use simple UI
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Use the MAME simple UI instead of the cabinet one. Simple UI will show you 20 random games but you can search for any by typing with the keyboard

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Scale beyond boundaries
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable it to scale beyond screen boundaries when a fixed scale is selected

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: TV overscan
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Enable it to apply a 10 pct safe area to correct overscan issues on some TV sets

PreferenceScreen.android:summary: Select it to open advanced options

com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:title: Use mame.ini for paths
com.seleuco.mame4droid.prefs.CheckBoxPre.android:summary: Use mame.ini instead of the values established by the emulator automatically to define the paths of the ROMs and other resources in external storage. Enabling this option can prevent you from seeing your ROMs if you don't know what you are doing

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Debug mode
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Only for developers

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Touch controller visible
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Disable to hide the touch controller. Useful when you are using a GamePad
Select to enable fullscreen portrait mode

CheckBoxPreference.android:title: Touch controller visible
CheckBoxPreference.android:summary: Disable to hide the touch controller. Useful when you are using a GamePad
